title: babynova Wide Neck Baby Bottle 300ml with Anti Colic Medium Flow Silicone Teat - Made in Germany - BPA-Free - Cherry Blossom
features: Natural shape: The round teat shape ensures gentle and safe feeding, encouraging a smooth and comfortable transition from breastfeeding to bottle feeding.

Colic relief: Our bottles are designed with anti-colic technology. The valve in the teat ensures pressure equalisation in the bottle creating a balanced liquid and air flow for more relaxed drinking without swallowing excess air.

Safe materials: The teat is made from BPA-free silicone and the bottle is made from high-quality polypropylene. To clean the product, carefully wash the bottle, teat and accessories under warm running water with a household washing up liquid. Ensure to disinfect regularly.

Healthy nutrition: Our silicone teats are available in three different flow rates (S,M,L) indicating how fast the liquid moves. Our medium flow is suitable for formula & follow-on milk. The wide bottle neck is designed for precise measuring and mixing.
Made in Germany: We are a proud family business that has been manufacturing baby products with care and quality since 1984 focusing on your baby's comfort and safety.
